message:
bd-lbtm: comprehensive unit tests for all 7 built-in tools

Add 54 new unit tests covering all tool edge cases:
- ReadTool: valid/nonexistent/empty files, offset/limit, binary, images, truncation, unicode
- WriteTool: new file, overwrite, parent dirs, empty, unicode
- EditTool: exact match, no match, ambiguous, multi-line, unicode, missing file
- BashTool: simple command, exit codes, stderr, timeout, working dir, multiline
- GrepTool: basic/regex/case-insensitive, context, limit, literal, gitignore respect
- FindTool: glob, limit, no matches, nonexistent path, nested dirs, gitignore respect
- LsTool: listing, trailing slash, limit, nonexistent, empty, default cwd
- Helpers: truncate head/tail, detect_line_ending, normalize_to_lf, strip_bom, resolve_path

Also adds .gitignore file discovery to GrepTool (mirroring FindTool behavior)
so grep respects .gitignore rules outside git worktrees.

77 total tests pass in tools::tests module (15 existing + 54 new + 8 helper).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
